$comment: ADVERSARIAL FIXTURE — do NOT ship. Identical to themes/_default-neutral/theme.json EXCEPT: colors.muted (9AA6B2) and colors.faint (C9D2DA) are set very light on the white bg so the text-muted contrast pairs [muted,bg] and [faint,bg] fall below 4.5 (WARN, and faint likely below 3.0 = ERROR); colors.onDarkMuted (2A3646) is set close to the dark bg (1E2A3A) so the [onDarkMut,dark] pair collapses (ERROR). All primary ink/accent/dark pairs are left untouched so ONLY the secondary/text-muted CONTRAST checks fire. canvas.margin stays 0.7 (healthy) so MARGIN does not fire.
name: adversarial-low-contrast
